title: guettarda mattogrossensis
intro: Guettarda mattogrossensis, also known as the "Mattos Guettarda", is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant's extracts have shown anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, contributing to its potential health benefits, including reduced oxidative stress and improved immune function. Guettarda mattogrossensis is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in folk medicine to make herbal remedies for various health conditions.
